about.name: REZUL .PHOTOGRAPHY
about.description: I’m a photographer who loves capturing real, meaningful moments. I focus on natural light, genuine emotions, and telling honest stories. I’m always exploring new ideas and perspectives to grow. I create images that feel real and truly connect with people.

images.title: Majestic Peaks
images.description: Sunset over the high altitude mountains highlighting the stark terrain naturally.

images.title: Urban Geometry
images.description: A minimalist approach to modern architectural design with high contrast black and white expression.

images.title: Morning Dew
images.description: Vibrant exotic flower details captured with a narrow depth of field in early morning light.
